session.user:
Run ty check on these specific files and report results: - src/erk/core/fast_llm.py - src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py - src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
Run: uv run ty check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py
session.assistant: I'll run the ty check on those three specific files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py
Run ty check on three specific files

session.assistant:
ty passed: All checks passed!
All three files have clean type checking: - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/fast_llm.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py
